57584.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
57584.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

57585.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
57585.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

57586.title: I Want My MTV 80s!
57586.description: It's '80s month here at MTV and we're saluting big hair, power suits and a decade of pure pop icons. It's non-stop nostalgia right here at MTV 80s!

57587.title: Pump Up The 80s Party!
57587.description: We've chosen all of the best 80s hits to go into one epic 80s party playlist. So pump up the volume and get ready to dance with some classic 80s tunes!

57588.title: ... So 80s!
57588.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
